title: Implement collision detection (capsule continuous + ray degeneration, block + entity, nearest hit)

reference_files.reason: Collision detection - bullet_size>0 capsule continuous collision (sphere swept volume), bullet_size=0 ray degeneration, nearest hit semantics (block vs entity take nearer), entity AABB inflation by bullet_size
Chunk bucketing - only 3x3 chunk neighborhood entities for raycast, block raycast uses BlockGetter.clip()

acceptance_criteria: CollisionDetector class created with detectCollision(Level level, BulletRecord bullet, Vec3 prevPos, Vec3 curPos) returning CollisionResult
CollisionResult record holds: hit type (NONE/ENTITY/BLOCK), distance, Entity hitEntity (if entity), BlockPos blockPos + Direction blockFace (if block)
bullet_size > 0: capsule continuous collision detection (sphere of radius bullet_size swept along [prevPos, curPos])
bullet_size = 0: ray degeneration (use BlockGetter.clip() for block, ray-AABB intersection for entity)
Block collision: uses level.clip() or BlockGetter.clip() for ray mode; custom capsule-block intersection for size>0
Entity collision: queries 3x3 chunk neighborhood via BulletManager.getBulletsInChunkRange, tests entity AABB (inflated by bullet_size) against capsule/ray
Nearest hit semantics: simultaneously collect first block hit distance (dBlock) and first entity hit distance (dEntity), return the nearer one
If both no hit: return CollisionResult.NONE
Skip entities already in bullet's penetrated entity set (dedup - set accessed from bullet record or passed as param)
Functions kept under 50 lines each (split block collision, entity collision, nearest-hit comparison into separate methods)
